completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part. Project type: web (Astro SSG). Framework: Astro 5 + Tailwind CSS 4. Language: TypeScript/Astro.
Found 1 existing doc: README.md. No .github, CONTRIBUTING.md, or ARCHITECTURE.md found.
Tech stack: Astro 5 on TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 4 (CSS-first). lucide-astro, astro-icon, marked. Architecture pattern: Flat SSG with data-as-code content.

Deep scan complete. 7 components read, 6 pages read, 5 content files read, 1 styles file read, 2 config files read. No API routes, no data models, no state management, no auth. UI components: 7 documented.
Source tree documented. 15 critical folders annotated. source-tree-analysis.md written.
Dev setup and deployment guides written. npm scripts documented. No CI/CD config found. robots.txt selection mechanism documented.
All supporting docs written: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md, architecture.md
Master index generated: index.md with navigation, quick reference table, getting started section
Workflow complete. 5 documentation files + 1 index + 1 state file generated.

findings.project_classification: Monolith, 1 part, web type (Astro SSG), TypeScript/Astro, Tailwind CSS 4
